items.title: These biggest and ‘least loved’ stocks are the ones to pick ahead of earnings
items.description: Profit growth will overcome artificial intelligence concerns and lift the S&P 500, says Evercore ISI

items.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
items.description: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

items.title: Oil prices surge as much as 5% after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz is closed
items.description: The week is kicking off with fresh spikes for oil prices as the U.S. and Iran continued to exchange attacks.

items.title: My wife’s 2011 Ford Fiesta was totaled. Should we accept a $2,000 insurance settlement or give up the car for $2,700?
items.description: “The hood is bent, the radiator is cracked, and the front bumper is destroyed.”

items.title: Geopolitical shock exposes SK Hynix leverage after hot ADR debut
items.description: Just one trading session after a highly successful U.S. listing for its depositary receipts, local shares in South Korean chip maker SK Hynix plummeted 15% on the domestic exchange in Seoul.

items.title: TSMC just reported a record month for revenue ahead of critical earnings report on Thursday
items.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Corp. said net revenue increased by 67% in June to $13.2 billion

items.title: Tennis star Jessica Pegula is a billionaire heiress — here’s a look at her family’s vast property portfolio
items.description: In addition to the Buffalo Bills, the Pegula family—which is worth an estimated $9.3 billion—also owns two other teams and an impressive collection of real estate.

items.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
items.description: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

items.title: Helen Mirren relists her longtime Hollywood Hills estate for $13 million after big renovation
items.description: Acclaimed actress Helen Mirren is giving buyers another chance to own a piece of her own illustrious Hollywood history—this time with a multimillion-dollar discount.

items.title: There’s good and bad news if you want to copy JPMorgan’s new AI agent that outperforms the 60/40 portfolio
items.description: JPMorgan says it’s designed an artificial-intelligent agent to evaluate markets and economic data and use it to outperform the standard 60/40 investing model, with less risk to boot.
